title: Abel (disambiguation)
content:
'''Abel''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Abel LaSal]]''', a [[commander]] in the [[Imperial Navy]].

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Abel]]''', a [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] on [[Dantooine/Legends|Dantooine]].
*'''[[Abel Quiller]]''', an alias used by [[Talon Karrde]].

==Real World==
*'''[[Abel G. Peña]]''', a ''[[Star Wars]]'' author.

==See also==
*'''[[Abal Karda]]''', an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] of the [[Lightning Battalion]]
*'''[[Able (disambiguation)]]'''
